calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Oct-04-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER GERMAN MOTORS CORPORATION's Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award:

Grant. No opposition filed.

Counsel for petitioner is required to prepare a proposed order which states tha the petition was not opposed and a proposed judgment which recites all the terms of relief made in the arbitration award.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

Notice Of Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-01-2021 Continued To Oct-04-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jonathan Nelson (310-463-6843; jnelson@triadinternational.com) Defendant in propria persona.
No other appearances.

Court notes not in compliance with tentative ruling rule and instructs defendant to properly comply with tentative ruling rule for next hearing date.

DISCUSSED re: defendant was not aware of hearing until a few days ago, wants to consult an attorney (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER GERMAN MOTORS CORPORATION'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is continued to October 4, 2021 at 9:30am in dept 302 for defendant to file timely opposition papers.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
